name: compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month tool
description: For compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 regulatory filings/month, manual data entry causes late submissions. We automate data collection and form generation instead of manual data entry and form submission.

problem_solved: Manual data collection and form generation for regulatory filings.
